name: Container Metadata Injector
description: Bakes build-time release version and date metadata directly into a system-wide command.

imageVersion.description: The automated version number injected from the runner host environment. Valid formats include 1, v1.2, 1.2.3.4, v2.0-12.

buildDate.description: If left empty, automatically sets to the current date and time formatted as an ISO 8601 UTC timestamp.
